raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee detwe to teem
Strahdneekeem/ ka tee ar to ta
KUNGA Nammu stiprinatu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no teem Wihrreem/
kam ta Nauda dohta tappe/ ka
tee to teem Strahdneekeim doh-
tu/ ne tappe Lahgadiba waizta-
ta/ jo tee darrija to peetizzigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta Nauda no teem No-
feedsisas-Uppureem/ un ta Nau-
da no teem Grehku-Uppureem ne
tappe eekſch ta KUNGA Nam-
ma nesta/ ta peenahze teem
Preestereem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Brihdi zehlahs Asa-
els to Sihrein kehninsch / un
karroja prett Gattu / un uṣneh-
me to. Pehz greesehs Asaëls
prett Jerusalemi zeltees/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Joas tas Kehninsch
no Juha nehme wiſſas eefweh-
titas Leetas/ ko winna Tehwi
Josawats/ un Jorams/ un Aka-
sijus tee Kehnixti no Juha bij
eefwehtijscht/ ir tahs Leetas/ ko
winſch pats btj eefwehtijs / un
wiſfu Seltu/ kas eekſch ta KUN-
GA Namma/ un eekſch ta Keh-
nixa Namma Mantahm atrasts
tappe/ un tuhttija to Asaëtam to
Sihrein Kehnixam. Tad zeh-
lehs wiſsch nohſt no Jerusalemes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Joafa
Leetahm atteek/ un wiſſo wiſsch
ier darrijs / tas irr rakstihts to
Kehnixu no Juha Laiku-Grah-
matā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Kalpi zehlahs/
un darrija weenu Derribu / un
kawe Joasu Milns Namnā/
kur eets tohp us Sillu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo Josakars Simenta
Dehls/ un Josabats Somera
Dehls winna Kalpi kawe to/ ka
tas nomirre. Un tee aprakke
winnu pee winna Tehweem Dah-
wida Pilli. Un winna Dehls
Amazijus tappe par Kehnixu
winna Weetā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Twideſmits treschā
Gaddā Joafa Akasijus
Dehla ta Kehnina no
Juha / tappe Joāās Jeūfa
Dehls par Kehnixu pahr Isra-
elu eekſch Samarijas feptinpa-
defmits Gaddus/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſsch darrija kas tam
KUNGAM ne patikke/ jo wiſsch
staigaja Jerobeaina Neebata
Dehla Grehkeem pakkat/ kas Is-
sraelu grehkoht darrija/ no teim
wiſsch ne afstahjahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz tas KUNGS toh-
ti eedusinojahs pahr Israēlu/ un
deive tohs Asaētam to Sihrein
Kehnixan/ un Ben-Adadam
Asaēta Dehlain Rohkā/ wiſſā
Latkā.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
